name: Sarah Chen
bio: Sarah discovered yoga during her years as a professional dancer and has been teaching for over a decade. Her classes blend precise alignment with creative sequencing, making each session a unique journey.

name: Mark Rivera
bio: A former Marine who found healing through yoga, Mark specializes in trauma-informed teaching and advanced practices. His classes are challenging yet accessible, with a focus on mental resilience.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Born in Rishikesh, India — the yoga capital of the world — Priya brings authentic Hatha and Iyengar traditions to every class. Her attention to alignment has helped thousands practice safely.

name: Jake Thompson
bio: Jake combines his background in sports science with yoga to create high-performance classes that build real-world strength. Perfect for athletes and fitness enthusiasts looking to cross-train.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: Emma's gentle approach makes yoga accessible to everyone, regardless of age or fitness level. She specializes in therapeutic yoga and has helped countless students manage chronic pain.
